leadId.title: leadId
leadId.description:
The Salesforce ID of the lead returned by 
Lookup Lead By Phone action.

rating.title: rating
rating.description: Numeric rating given by user between 1 and 5.

reviewId.title: reviewId
reviewId.description:
Pass this only if updating an existing review. 
Leave empty for new review creation. Comes from 
reviewId returned by Fetch Review For Test Drive action.

reviewText.title: reviewText
reviewText.description: The review text typed by the user.

testDriveId.title: testDriveId
testDriveId.description:
The Salesforce ID of the selected test drive. 
Comes from part 2 of idMap from Fetch Test Drives action.

vehicleId.title: vehicleId
vehicleId.description:
The Salesforce ID of the Vehicle record linked 
to the selected test drive. Comes from part 4 
of idMap from Fetch Test Drives action.
